# store-stride entry-capacity test
# access mode: store (strb), same fixed PC for victim train and trigger
# stride=320 rounds=1000 page_size=4096 access_pc=0x0000000500000120 victim_buffer=0x0000000600000000
# STRIDE_LINES=5 TRAIN_ACCESSES=1 TRIGGER_ACCESSES=1 COMPETITOR_ACCESSES=1 PROBE_LINES=64 max_competitors=1024 page_step_pages=1
# victim accesses=2 train_only_accesses=1 trigger_accesses=1 stride_lines=5
# victim trigger lines: 5..5
# victim probe/predicted line: 10
# competitor accesses per page: 1 stores, stride_lines=5
# lower latency means that victim line was more likely prefetched
# no_trigger_n0_latency_ns=143
n	probe_line	offset_bytes	role	avg_ns	probes
0	10	640	predicted	144	1000
1	10	640	predicted	143	1000
2	10	640	predicted	144	1000
3	10	640	predicted	142	1000
